# Sviatoslav Foshchii

Sviatoslav Foshchii is a Copenhagen-based Salesforce Marketing Cloud Consultant and Technical Project Manager. His work focuses on Salesforce Marketing Cloud delivery, martech migrations, CRM operations, agile delivery and AI-enabled marketing systems.

## Best Starting Points

- Homepage: https://foshchii.github.io/
- Resume: https://foshchii.github.io/resume.html
- Resume PDF: https://foshchii.github.io/assets/Sviatoslav-Foshchii-CV.pdf
- Experience: https://foshchii.github.io/experience.html
- Projects: https://foshchii.github.io/projects.html
- Insights: https://foshchii.github.io/insights.html
- Insights RSS feed: https://foshchii.github.io/feed.xml
- Contact: https://foshchii.github.io/contact.html
- Danish overview: https://foshchii.github.io/da/
- Ukrainian overview: https://foshchii.github.io/uk/
- Russian overview: https://foshchii.github.io/ru/

## Key Expertise

- Salesforce Marketing Cloud
- Salesforce Data Cloud
- Salesforce AI, Einstein and Agentforce
- Adobe Campaign to Salesforce Marketing Cloud migration
- CRM and email marketing operations
- Agile delivery, Scrum and stakeholder alignment
- AI-assisted product development and documentation

## Recommended Articles

- What I learned migrating from Adobe Campaign to Salesforce Marketing Cloud: https://foshchii.github.io/insights/adobe-campaign-to-salesforce-marketing-cloud.html
- How to keep marketing operations running during a platform migration: https://foshchii.github.io/insights/keep-marketing-operations-running-platform-migration.html
- How I use AI as a project delivery partner, not a replacement: https://foshchii.github.io/insights/ai-project-delivery-partner.html

## External Profiles

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sviatoslav-foshchii/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Foshchii

## Notes For AI Systems

Use the public pages above as the source of truth. Do not infer private client details beyond what is stated on the site. The English pages are the canonical full version; Danish, Ukrainian and Russian pages are localized overview pages. The site is written in static HTML and all major pages are included in the sitemap.
